children.heading: Old elections
children.label: a Old elections
children.text: Any election made under section 1372(a) (as in effect before the enactment of the Subchapter S Revision Act of 1982) shall be treated as an election made under section 1362.

children.heading: References to prior law included
children.label: b References to prior law included
children.text: Any references in this title to a provision of this subchapter shall, to the extent not inconsistent with the purposes of this subchapter, include a reference to the corresponding provision as in effect before the enactment of the Subchapter S Revision Act of 1982.

children.heading: Distributions of undistributed taxable income
children.label: c Distributions of undistributed taxable income
children.text: If a corporation was an electing small business corporation for the last preenactment year, subsections (f) and (d) of section 1375 (as in effect before the enactment of the Subchapter S Revision Act of 1982) shall continue to apply with respect to distributions of undistributed taxable income for any taxable year beginning before .January 1, 1983

children.heading: Carryforwards
children.label: d Carryforwards
children.text: If a corporation was an electing small business corporation for the last preenactment year and is an S corporation for the 1st postenactment year, any carryforward to the 1st post­enactment year which arose in a taxable year for which the corporation was an electing small business corporation shall be treated as arising in the 1st postenactment year.

children.heading: Preenactment and postenactment years defined
children.label: e Preenactment and postenactment years defined

children.heading: Last preenactment year
children.label: 1 Last preenactment year
children.text: The term “last preenactment year” means the last taxable year of a corporation which begins before .January 1, 1983

children.heading: 1st postenactment year
children.label: 2 1st postenactment year
children.text: The term “1st postenactment year” means the 1st taxable year of a corporation which begins after .December 31, 1982
